name: AnalysisNode
summary: The AnalysisNode class contains information related to analysis nodes.

constructors.name: AnalysisNode
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the AnalysisNode class.

methods.name: Delete
methods.summary: Deletes an analysis node. The ID has to be set.

methods.name: GetAnalysisNodeLinks
methods.summary: Get analysis nodelinks connected to node.

methods.name: GetAnalysisParts
methods.summary: Get analysis parts connected to node.

methods.name: Insert
methods.summary: Inserts an analysis node. The AnalysisModelName has to be set.

methods.name: Modify
methods.summary: Modifies an analysis node. The ID has to be set.

methods.name: Select
methods.summary: Selects an analysis node. The ID has to be set.

properties.name: AnalysisModelName
properties.summary: Gets or sets the analysis model name.

properties.name: AnalysisObjectType
properties.summary: Gets or sets the type of the analysis object.

properties.name: CoordinateSystem
properties.summary: The coordinate system of the analysis node.

properties.name: FatherObject2ID
properties.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the father part.

properties.name: FatherObject2Type
properties.summary: Gets or sets the type of the father object.

properties.name: FatherObjectID
properties.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the father part.

properties.name: FatherObjectType
properties.summary: Gets or sets the type of the father object.

properties.name: ID
properties.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the analysis object.

properties.name: IsUserNode
properties.summary: Indicates whether the analysis node is a user node.

properties.name: IsUserSupport
properties.summary: Indicates whether the analysis node has a user node.

properties.name: Label
properties.summary: The label of the analysis node.

properties.name: Position
properties.summary: The position of the analysis node (in the global coordinate system).

properties.name: Support
properties.summary: The support of the analysis node.
